programmes.show_description: Shanksgiving: Peter searches for a way to avoid Lois's special family Thanksgiving dinner and resorts to getting arrested. Plus, a big secret of Stewie's is revealed.
Little Bonnie Ramirez: After a series of boring personas, Roger goes to great lengths to prove to Francine he still has his edge - but his plan spirals out of control.
Shakedown Steve: A lonely Steve finds a friend in Jeff, and the two soon become involved in a huge scam. Elsewhere, the family attempt an escape room.
Reality show hosted by Olivia Attwood. It's judgement day as the six remaining chefs fight it out for two places in the final before a celebration with one last night in Barcelona.
These Boots Are Made for Stalking: Animated comedy. Tina tries desperately to connect with cool teenagers who visit the restaurant, and Gene and Louise face off in a strange duel.
Stop! Or My Mom Will Sleuth!: Animated comedy. Linda attempts to figure out the truth when Louise is suspected of stealing a toy, and Bob helps Teddy design a new business card.

Shopping from home.
Shopping from home.
Revenge of the Man Crab: Animated adventures. The gang must solve the mystery behind a hideous man-crab that attacks a beach volleyball tournament - and then kidnaps Daphne.
The Song of Mystery: Animated adventures. A monster named Que Horrifico is turning the children of Crystal Cove into monsters, so Scooby and the gang go undercover as a family.
Trading Chases: Animated adventure series. Fred switches places with the tour guide at a history museum to give him a chance to solve a mystery involving a Egyptian crocodile deity.
Be Quiet, Scooby-Doo!: Animated adventure series. The gang enter the Crystal Canopy, a labyrinth of intricate crystal formations, to solve the mystery of the creepy Crystal Crawler!
Entertainer's Palace Miami: House-hunting show. A luxury event planner wants a condominium with spectacular water views that also has plenty of space for her shoe collection.

programmes.show_name: Billie and Greg: The Family Diaries
programmes.show_description: Reality series. Billie puts a plan involving Greg in place to get some sleep after her first night away from Margot, and the couple give Nelly a big surprise.
Reality series. The group head off for a well-earned break in sunny Bali. Dani feels guilty for keeping a secret from Harry but, as the two get closer, will she tell him?
Invite Only: US reality series. Marysol hosts a shopping spree luncheon, Nicole is brought to tears after learning that she is being iced out, and Julia forces Adriana to come clean.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programmes.show_description: Reunion Part Three: US reality series. The reunion concludes with a surprise appearance from familiar face Kathy Hilton, but her presence draws mixed reactions.
There's more life-changing money on offer as Ant and Dec welcome engaged couple Zanesh and Melike back to the show before father-and-son team David and Mark play a remarkable game.
Graham Norton hosts as engineer John, safeguarding coordinator Roxy, and content writer Lewis all try to claim a possible 50,000 pounds by spinning the Wheel and solving puzzles.
Reality series. Dani finally tells Harry that Joe got together with Junaid before his relationship with Harry officially ended, and Ella has a heart-to-heart with Saff about Bali.
All Will Be Revealed...: Reality series. Lauren gets some new housemates, Ampika drops a big surprise, and Rachel and Lystra finally meet up and try to make up.
Sink or Swim: US reality series. Julia walks the runway for the first time in 24 years, and Nicole and the Bros come face to face to get to the bottom of the Mother's Day Massacre.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programmes.show_description: Grace Time is Over: US reality series. Change is in the air as Erika reinvents herself, Garcelle takes on new roles, and Kyle and Dorit navigate life post-separation.
Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show with Dion Dublin, Rachel Riley, and Tim Vine all trying to 'say what they see' in aid of their chosen charity.
Graham Norton welcomes three new players - cleaner Fillie, business manager Craig, and university graduate Becky - as they spin the Wheel while solving puzzles to win cash prizes.
Best friends Terri and Jess - and husband and wife Paul and Ellie - each take on the Limitless Ladder as Ant and Dec try to help them win truly life-changing sums of money.
Reality show hosted by Olivia Attwood. It's the final service and one cook must be crowned as star chef, but love might still be the dish of the day when the dust settles.
Start Me Up: Peter is told by his boss to work from home due to his excessive sweating. Stewie and Chris cause thousands of dollars in damage at an electronics store.
Connie's Celica: Louis gets a job at Chris and Meg's school as a music teacher, but soon becomes the victim of a mean student's pranks.
Short Cuts: An old face comes back into Brian's life after he becomes a local hero by bumping into and apprehending a robber.
Dancing' A-With My Cells: Annoyed with the kids' refusal to take anything seriously, Stan tries DNA splicing at the CIA lab, but things soon get out of hand.
Klaus and Rogu in 'Thank God for Loose Rocks': US animated comedy. When the family goes to a ranch, Klaus and Rogu have to work together to survive in the wilderness.
Reality show hosted by Olivia Attwood. It's the final service and one cook must be crowned as star chef, but love might still be the dish of the day when the dust settles.
The Show (and Tell) Must Go On: Animated comedy. Louise takes a risk for her last show and tell by trying to recover a War of 1812-era cannonball from a beach cave at a high tide.
What a (April) Fool Believes: Animated comedy. When Mr Fischoeder challenges Bob to prank him on April Fools' Day or face eviction, Bob grows suspicious of who is pranking whom.

The Legacy of Alice May: Animated adventures. There is a new girl at Crystal Cove High, and she has set her romantic sights on Fred. There's only one problem - Alice is a ghost.
In Fear of the Phantom: Animated adventures. Velma's favourite band, the Hex Girls, are in town - and the gang have front row seats. Unfortunately, so does an evil phantom.
Halloween: Animated adventure series. The gang goes trick or treating on Halloween night, but the experience goes wrong when Fred runs into a witch that he met before 11 years ago.
Screama Donna: Animated adventure series. In order to solve the mystery of a ghostly performer haunting her former venue, the gang has to pretend to be a rock band themselves!
Rural Casa Niagara: House-hunting show. Barry is recently divorced and looking for a new beginning in Niagara-on-the-Lake with a big home to house himself and his two daughters.
Reality series. Roman throws a party where Dan and Ella aren't in any mood to celebrate, Ella and Amber come face-to-face, and some familiar faces return to surprise Harry.
Reality series. Bombshell news sends shockwaves through the Essex crew on a night out, Dan and Ella are happier than ever, and Harry decides to focus on himself.
Reality series. Emotions run high when Jodie and Diags discuss their split, tensions rise when Dani and Harry bump into Junaid and Freddie, and Dan invites his mum to meet Ella.
Stephen Mulhern is joined by Yahya as he aims to become a jackpot winner and give as good as he gets from the Banker.
Stephen Mulhern hosts as Helen steps up to face the infamous Banker in the hope of leaving him 100,000 pounds worse off.
Rob Brydon hosts a nail-biting semi-final of the game show as the last 17 players fight for a place in the grand finale and a shot at 50,000 pounds.
The search for the most spectacular entertainers to hit these shores continues in Blackpool as more hopefuls are welcomed by award-winning hosts Ant & Dec and face the judges.
